and then comparing the cost 
of those PDEs to the benefit structure for the beneficiary’s plan. 

The benefit phase is described using a two-digit code. The first digit indicates the benefit phase 
immediately before the prescription was filled, and the second digit indicates the benefit phase 
immediately after the prescription was filled. The two digits are necessary because the benefit phases 
depend on specific dollar amounts and often do not split exactly between prescription fills; that
